sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67008" key="metauxe/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταυχένιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">behind the neck</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ μ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">back of the shoulders</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:177" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.177</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
